title: Buying a Metro Card
scene: 你第一次在纽约坐地铁，买MetroCard。

turns.cn: 你好，我想买一张地铁卡。
turns.en: Hi, I'd like to buy a MetroCard.
How much do you want to load? Each ride is two seventy-five.
Twenty dollars, please.
Card or cash is fine.
Which line goes to Times Square?
Take the N or R train heading uptown.
Thank you!

title: On the Bus
scene: 你在公交站等车，向司机问路。

turns.en: Does this bus go downtown?

turns.cn: 对，请刷卡或投币两块二五。
turns.en: Yes. Please tap your card or pay two twenty-five.

turns.cn: 请在第五大道让我下车。
turns.en: Could you let me off at Fifth Avenue?
Sure. I'll call it out when we get there.
How long will it take?
About twenty minutes, depending on traffic.
Okay. Thanks!

title: Missed Your Stop
scene: 你不小心坐过了站，向工作人员求助。

turns.en: Excuse me, I missed my stop.
Which stop were you supposed to get off at?
The last one, Twenty-Eighth Street.

turns.cn: 下一站下车，走对面站台坐回去。
turns.en: Get off at the next stop and cross to the opposite platform.
Do I need to swipe my card again?

turns.cn: 不用，两小时内换乘免费。
turns.en: No, transfers are free within two hours.
Great. Thank you!

title: Rideshare
scene: 你用App叫了网约车，上车和司机确认。

turns.en: Are you Zhang Wei?
Yes. I'm going to one twenty-three Main Street.

turns.cn: 大概十五分钟，系好安全带。
turns.en: About fifteen minutes. Please buckle up.
Could you open the window? It's a bit stuffy.
Sure. Would you like some music?

turns.cn: 不用了，谢谢。到了麻烦告诉我。
turns.en: No thanks. Just let me know when we arrive.
We're here. Have a great day!

title: Train Delay
scene: 地铁站广播列车晚点，你向工作人员询问换乘。

turns.en: The N train is running about twenty minutes late.

turns.cn: 我有换乘，会错过连接车吗？
turns.en: I have a connection. Will I miss my transfer?

turns.cn: 您可以改坐R线，在42街换乘。
turns.en: You can take the R train and transfer at Forty-Second Street.
Do I need to buy another ticket?

turns.cn: 不用，同一张卡两小时内免费换乘。
turns.en: No. Transfers are free within two hours on the same card.
Which platform is the R train on?

turns.cn: 对面站台，往北方向，请看指示牌。
turns.en: The opposite platform, heading uptown. Follow the signs.

title: Which Bus to Downtown
scene: 你在公交站不确定坐哪辆车。

turns.en: Which bus goes downtown?
Fourteen or thirty-eight. Check the direction on the sign.
Do I need to transfer to the subway?
Fourteen is direct. Thirty-eight transfers.
Tap card or coins?
Clipper card. Tap when you board.
Thanks!

title: Card Declined at Turnstile
scene: 地铁闸机刷卡失败，你向工作人员求助。

turns.en: My card won't go through. It says insufficient.

turns.cn: 余额可能不够，最低两块五。
turns.en: Balance might be low. Minimum two fifty to enter.
Which machine adds value?

turns.cn: 那台灰色，现金或信用卡。
turns.en: Gray one over there. Cash or credit.
Is ten dollars enough?
Yes. Try this gate again after.
It works. Thanks.

title: Missed Your Stop
scene: 你没听清报站坐过了，问司机怎么办。

turns.cn: 不好意思，我该在Market街下，坐过了吗？
turns.en: Sorry, I needed Market Street. Did I miss it?

turns.cn: 刚过一站，下一站下车往回走。
turns.en: One stop back. Get off next and walk back.
How long a walk?
Five minutes, or catch the thirty-eight the other way.
Do I tap again on the return bus?
Free transfer within two hours.
Thank you.

title: Reading the Subway Map
scene: 你在地铁站研究路线图，向路人求助。

turns.cn: 去机场要转几次？我看不懂颜色线。
turns.en: How many transfers to the airport? I can't follow the colored lines.
Yellow north first, then blue at Embarcadero.
Final stop is SFO, right?
Right. Don't board wrong way. Look for uptown.
How long total?
About forty minutes.
Thanks so much!

title: Bus Is Full
scene: 早高峰公交满了，你问司机还能上吗。

turns.en: Can I still get on?
You can stand by the door. Hold the rail.
Could you tell me when we reach Mission Street?
I'll call it out. Watch the screen too.

turns.cn: 下一站是哪里？没听清广播。
turns.en: What's the next stop? I didn't catch the announcement.
Sixteenth Street. Mission is two stops after.
Thanks.

title: Train Platform Direction
scene: 你不确定等的车是否方向正确。

turns.en: Is this train going to Berkeley?
Opposite platform. This side goes to San Jose.
What time is the last train?

turns.cn: 工作日十二点十五，周末早一点。
turns.en: Twelve fifteen weekdays. Earlier on weekends.
Can I bring a bike?

turns.cn: 非高峰可以，看车厢贴纸。
turns.en: Off-peak yes. Check the car stickers.
Got it. Thanks.
